creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 227819
Screenshot of Thunderbird

I note the absence of 
freebsd-questions/ 
from
<https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/>

----

At the time of writing, 
<https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-September/date.html#294759> is _supposedly_ for the most recently archived message, 
2021-09-09 13:04:22 UTC
<https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-September/294759.html>

_however_ the one substantial (non-quoted) line from the author: 

> The first sector of an extended partition has the same layout as the MBR.

– was posted in August (not September), 2021-08-27 15:38. Screenshot attached.
